table.name: Boost disable during fuel cut-RPM threshold
Boost disable during fuel cut-Load threshold
Boost disable during fuel cut-Boost(bar) threshold
Boost disable during fuel cut-Boost(psi) threshold
Target Boost Compensation (1st Gear) Speed Disable
Primary Open Loop Fueling (KCA Additive B Low)
Primary Open Loop Fueling (KCA Additive B High)
Primary Open Loop Fueling (KCA Alternate Mode)
Primary Open Loop Fueling (Failsafe)(KCA Alternate Mode)
Primary Open Loop Fuel Map Switch (IAM)
Minimum Active Primary Open Loop Enrichment
Primary Open Loop Fueling Compensation (Timing Compensation)_
CL Fueling Target Compensation Imm. Cruise (ECT)
CL Fueling Target Compensation Imm. Non-Cruise (ECT)
CL to OL Delay/Switch SI-DRIVE Intelligent
CL to OL Transition with Delay (Throttle)
CL to OL Transition with Delay Throttle Hysteresis
CL to OL Transition with Delay (Base Pulse Width)
CL to OL Transition with Delay BPW Hysteresis
CL to OL Transition Counter Step Value (MAF)
CL Delay Engine Load Counter Threshold
CL Delay Maximum Engine Speed (Per Gear)
Per Injector Pulse Width Compensation A
Per Injector Pulse Width Compensation B
Per Injector Pulse Width Compensation C
Per Injector Pulse Width Compensation D
Cranking Fuel Injector Pulse Width A (ECT)

Cranking Fuel Injector Pulse Width F (ECT)

Tip-in Enrichment Disable Throttle Cumulative Threshold B (ECT)
Base Timing Idle Minimum Vehicle Speed Enable
Timing Comp Minimum Coolant Temp (Per Cylinder)
Extended Feedback Correction High RPM Compensation
Rough Correction Minimum KC Advance Map Value
Advance Multiplier (Initial)
table.description: Initial knock correction advance multiplier. Controls starting multiplier for knock feedback advance recovery.

table.name: Advance Multiplier Step Value
table.description: Step value for knock correction advance multiplier increment per cycle during recovery.

table.name: Requested Torque (Accelerator Pedal) SI-DRIVE Sport Sharp
Target Throttle Plate Position Cruise (Requested Torque Ratio)
Target Throttle Plate Position Non-Cruise (Requested Torque Ratio)
Target Throttle Plate Position Maximum (Requested Torque Ratio)
Speed Limiting A (Throttle) SI-DRIVE Sport/Sport Sharp
Speed Limiting B (Throttle) SI-DRIVE Sport/Sport Sharp

table.name: Low Pulse Width Fuel Injector Compensation
Low pulse width fuel injector compensation maximum RPM
Low pulse width fuel injector compensation maximum IPW
Requested Torque Limit A (Per Gear/Engine Speed)
Requested Torque Limit B (Per Gear/Engine Speed)
Engine Load Limit B Maximum (RPM) - Multiplier
table.category: Alpha Engine Load Limit B Multiplier

table.name: Fuel Pump Duty Max (Prime/Cranking)
table.description: Maximum fuel pump duty cycle used during key-on priming and cranking. Stock value: 100.0%. This is a float constant embedded in code space.

table.name: Fuel Pump Duty High (Running)
table.description: High fuel pump duty cycle for normal engine running during warmup. Used when engine is running but run-time has not yet exceeded the ~75 second threshold. Stock value: 66.7%.

table.name: Fuel Pump Duty Low (Idle/Steady)
table.description: Low fuel pump duty cycle for idle and steady-state operation. Active after engine has been running for ~75 seconds. Stock value: 33.3%.

table.name: Fuel Pump Min Voltage Threshold
table.description: Minimum battery voltage before fuel pump duty reduction is allowed. Below this voltage, the pump stays at higher duty. Stock value: 8.0V.

table.name: Fuel Pump Run Time Gate A
table.description: Engine run time threshold (in 20ms ticks) before fuel pump can reduce from high to low duty. 3750 ticks = ~75 seconds. Stock value: 3750.

table.name: Fuel Pump Run Time Gate B
table.description: Secondary engine run time threshold for fuel pump duty reduction. Same as Gate A for non-throttle state. Stock value: 3750.

table.name: Tau Input A Falling Load Activation
Tau Input A Falling Load Activation A
Tau Input A Falling Load Activation B
Tau Input A Falling Load Activation C
Tau Input A Rising Load Activation
Overrun Fueling Cut Counter RPM Threshold
Idle Airflow Min Target Decel Adder (RPM x ECT)
Idle Airflow Min Target Decel Adder Active Veh Speed A
Idle Airflow Min Target Decel Initial Idle Min Airflow A
Idle Airflow Min Target Decel Initial Idle Activation Max Mode Counter
Idle Airflow Min Target Decel Ramping Adder Decreasing
Idle Airflow Min Target Decel Ramping Adder Increasing

table.description: OBD-II diagnostic trouble code monitor. Enable/disable and threshold configuration.

table.name: AF 3 Correction Limits
table.description: CHANGING THIS VALUE MIN-MAX TO 0 INPUT RESULTS IN THE DISABLITY OF THE REAR O2 SENSOR INPUT ON TARGET AFR, THIS AFR TRIM 3 CAN CAUSE RICHER THAT DISIRED IDLES WHEN LEFT ON. DISABLE IF EXPERINCING RICHER THAN IDEAL IDLES WHEN ALL OTHER SCALING IS VERIFYED CORRECT OR REAR O2 SENSOR DELETE.

table.name: Map Switching Engine Speed Threshold
table.description: Engine speed threshold used in cruise/non-cruise map switching logic. When RPM exceeds this value, it contributes to transitioning toward non-cruise mode. Stock value: 2000 RPM.

table.name: Map Switching Requested Torque Ratio Threshold
table.description: Requested torque ratio threshold for cruise/non-cruise switching. When the torque ratio exceeds this value, the ECU moves toward non-cruise mode. Stock value: 0.8798.

table.name: Map Switching MAF/Load Threshold
table.description: MAF or engine load threshold for cruise/non-cruise switching. Stock value: 2.0 g/rev.

table.name: Map Switching Vehicle Speed Low Threshold
table.description: Lower vehicle speed threshold for map switching logic. Stock value: 550.

table.name: Map Switching Vehicle Speed High Threshold
table.description: Upper vehicle speed threshold for map switching logic. Stock value: 1300.

table.name: Map Switching IAT Threshold
table.description: Intake air temperature threshold for cruise/non-cruise switching. Stock value: 80 deg F.

table.name: Map Switching Idle Mode Threshold
table.description: Idle mode threshold for map switching. Stock value: 0.0 (not in idle).

table.name: Map Switching SI-Drive Mode Threshold
table.description: SI-Drive mode threshold for map switching. Stock value: 4.0.

table.name: Map Switching ECT Cold Threshold Low
table.description: Lower ECT cold threshold for map switching ratio modification. Stock value: -39 deg F.

table.name: Map Switching ECT Cold Threshold High
table.description: Upper ECT cold threshold for map switching ratio modification. Stock value: -20 deg F.

table.name: Map Switching ECT/IAT Hot Threshold A
table.description: ECT/IAT hot threshold A for map switching. Stock value: 120 deg F.

table.name: Map Switching ECT/IAT Hot Threshold B
table.description: ECT/IAT hot threshold B for map switching. Stock value: 60 deg F.

table.name: Map Switching Ratio Modifier Min
table.description: Minimum value for the map switching ratio modifier. Stock value: 0.0.

table.name: Map Switching Ratio Modifier Scale
table.description: Scale factor for the map switching ratio modifier. Stock value: 13.0.

table.name: Map Switch Ramping Adder A
table.description: Rate at which the map ratio ramps when transitioning toward cruise or non-cruise mode. Higher values = faster transitions. Stock value: 0.7.

table.name: Map Switch Ramping Adder B
table.description: Rate at which the map ratio ramps when transitioning toward cruise or non-cruise mode. Higher values = faster transitions. Stock value: 0.7.

table.name: Map Switching MAF Sensor Threshold A
table.description: MAF sensor threshold A for secondary map switching condition evaluation. Stock value: 60.0 g/s.

table.name: Map Switching MAF Sensor Threshold B
table.description: MAF sensor threshold B for secondary map switching condition evaluation. Stock value: 0.0.

table.name: Map Switching Requested Torque Min
table.description: Minimum requested torque threshold for map switching evaluation. Stock value: 5.0.

table.name: Map Switching Per-Gear RPM Threshold 1
table.description: Per-gear RPM threshold (gear 1) for map switching. All gears stock at 4000 RPM.

table.name: Map Switching Per-Gear RPM Threshold 2
table.description: Per-gear RPM threshold (gear 2) for map switching. Stock value: 4000 RPM.

table.name: Map Switching Per-Gear RPM Threshold 3
table.description: Per-gear RPM threshold (gear 3) for map switching. Stock value: 4000 RPM.

table.name: Map Switching Per-Gear RPM Threshold 4
table.description: Per-gear RPM threshold (gear 4) for map switching. Stock value: 4000 RPM.

table.name: Map Switching Per-Gear RPM Threshold 5
table.description: Per-gear RPM threshold (gear 5) for map switching. Stock value: 4000 RPM.

table.name: Map Switching Per-Gear RPM Threshold 6
table.description: Per-gear RPM threshold (gear 6) for map switching. Stock value: 4000 RPM.

table.name: Map Switching Base RPM Threshold
table.description: Base RPM threshold for secondary map switching conditions. Stock value: 2800 RPM.

table.name: Map Switching ECT Compensation A
table.description: ECT compensation value A for map switching. Stock value: 10.0.

table.name: Map Switching ECT Compensation B
table.description: ECT compensation value B for map switching. Stock value: 10.0.

table.name: Map Switching ECT Threshold
table.description: ECT threshold for secondary map switching conditions. Stock value: 69.7 deg F.

table.name: Map Switching RPM Override Threshold
table.description: RPM above which the map switching ratio is overridden. Stock value: 12000 RPM.

table.name: Map Switching Load Override Threshold
table.description: Load value above which the map switching ratio is overridden. Stock value: 5.0.

table.name: Map Switching Speed/Load Check Value
table.description: Speed/load check value for map switching. Stock value: 10.0.

table.name: Map Switching Engine Speed Hysteresis Low
table.description: Lower RPM hysteresis bound for map switching. Stock value: 7900 RPM.

table.name: Map Switching Engine Speed Hysteresis High
table.description: Upper RPM hysteresis bound for map switching. Stock value: 8000 RPM.

table.name: Map Switching Ratio Minimum Bound
table.description: Minimum bound for the map switching ratio output. Stock value: 0.0.

table.name: Map Switching Ratio Maximum Bound
table.description: Maximum bound for the map switching ratio output. Stock value: 20.0.

table.name: Map Switching Percentage Ceiling
table.description: Percentage ceiling for map switching calculation. Stock value: 100.0.

table.name: Map Switching Secondary Torque Threshold
table.description: Secondary torque ratio threshold for cruise/non-cruise switching. Used when the primary path (D2A0C) fails. Stock value: 0.0 (effectively disabled).

table.name: Map Switching Secondary Load Threshold
table.description: Secondary engine load threshold for cruise/non-cruise switching. Stock value: 0.0 (effectively disabled).

table.name: Map Switching Secondary Vehicle Speed Low
table.description: Secondary vehicle speed lower bound for cruise/non-cruise switching. Stock value: 0.0 (effectively disabled).

table.name: Map Switching Secondary Vehicle Speed High
table.description: Secondary vehicle speed upper bound for cruise/non-cruise switching. Stock value: 0.0 (effectively disabled).

table.name: Map Switching Secondary IAT Threshold
table.description: Secondary IAT threshold for cruise/non-cruise switching. Stock value: 119.0 deg F.

table.name: Map Switching Secondary SI-Drive Value
table.description: Secondary SI-DRIVE mode value for cruise/non-cruise switching. Stock value: 0.0 (effectively disabled).

table.name: Map Switching Blend App Counter Threshold
table.description: Counter threshold for blend application in task32. Cruise switch counter must exceed this value before switching proceeds. Stock value: 88.

table.name: Map Switching Cruise Switch Counter A
table.description: Delay counter A for cruise/non-cruise switching. Controls how many scheduler cycles before the switch is committed. Stock value: 50.

table.name: Map Switching Cruise Switch Min Delay A
table.description: Minimum delay A before cruise/non-cruise switch is permitted. Stock value: 38.

table.name: Map Switching Cruise Switch Counter B
table.description: Delay counter B for cruise/non-cruise switching. Stock value: 100.

table.name: Map Switching Cruise Switch Min Delay B
table.description: Minimum delay B before cruise/non-cruise switch is permitted. Stock value: 38.

table.name: Timing Blend Lookup Input Threshold
table.description: Input threshold for the timing blend lookup. Stock value: 10.0.

table.name: Timing Blend RPM Activation Threshold
table.description: RPM threshold above which timing blending becomes active. Stock value: 700 RPM.

table.name: Timing Blend RPM Secondary Threshold
table.description: Secondary RPM threshold for timing blend logic. Stock value: 600 RPM.

table.name: Timing Blend IAT Threshold A
table.description: IAT threshold A for timing blend calculations. Stock value: 69.65 deg F.

table.name: Timing Blend IAT Threshold B
table.description: IAT threshold B for timing blend calculations. Stock value: 69.65 deg F.

table.name: Timing Blend Correction Offset
table.description: Correction offset applied during timing blending. Stock value: -3.0 degrees.

table.name: Timing Blend RPM Max for Blending
table.description: Maximum RPM for timing blend operation. Stock value: 10000 RPM.

table.name: Timing Blend Ramping Rate
table.description: Rate/factor at which the timing blend ratio changes per cycle. Stock value: 0.35.

table.name: Timing Blend Correction Threshold
table.description: Correction threshold for timing blend calculations. Stock value: 44.0 degrees.

table.name: Timing Blend Half Ratio (Map Ratio E42)
table.description: Half-ratio value used in timing blend. Likely the Map Ratio E42 reference value. Stock value: 0.5.

table.name: Timing Blend Minimum Ratio
table.description: Minimum ratio value for timing blend. Stock value: 0.0.

table.name: Timing Blend RPM Limit
table.description: RPM limit for timing blend operation. Stock value: 6000 RPM.

table.name: Timing Blend Ratio Floor
table.description: Floor value for the timing blend ratio. Stock value: 0.0.

table.name: Timing Blend Ratio Ceiling
table.description: Ceiling value for the timing blend ratio. Stock value: 1.0.

table.name: AFL Decay Rate (CL to OL Transition Speed)
table.description: Controls how quickly the A/F Learning (AFL) correction decays toward zero when transitioning from closed loop to open loop. This is an additive decay applied each ECU cycle to the internal AFL accumulator (FFFF798C). When the accumulator reaches near-zero the CL to OL mode switch fires. Higher values = faster decay = faster CL to OL transition. Stock value at low RPM (0-4000): 0.003052 (~1.68s transition at WOT from ~2900 RPM). The axis is engine speed (RPM). Note: this table controls the natural transition timing built into the ECU - it is NOT the CL to OL Delay counter parameter.

table.name: CL MAF Enable Threshold
table.description: MAF threshold for CL learning enable. Stock: 70.0 g/s.

table.name: CL MAF Hysteresis ON
table.description: CL readiness MAF hysteresis ON threshold. Stock: 1000.0 g/s. Effectively disabled (MAF never reaches this).

table.name: CL MAF Hysteresis OFF
table.description: CL readiness MAF hysteresis OFF threshold. Stock: 1100.0 g/s. Effectively disabled.

table.name: Barometric Pressure Offset
table.description: Barometric pressure calculation offset. baro = offset + normalized_MAP * scale. Stock: -414.0.

table.name: Torque Request Minimum APP
table.description: Minimum accelerator pedal position for torque request enable. Stock: 0.46.

table.name: Torque Request MAF Upper Gate
table.description: MAF upper gate for torque request processing. Stock: 1000.0 g/s.

table.name: Torque Request MAF Maximum
table.description: MAF absolute maximum for torque request. Stock: 2000.0 g/s.

table.name: MAF Hysteresis A ON (CL/OL)
table.description: MAF-based CL/OL hysteresis flag A set threshold. Stock: 5600.0 g/s.

table.name: MAF Hysteresis A OFF (CL/OL)
table.description: MAF-based CL/OL hysteresis flag A clear threshold. Stock: 5100.0 g/s.

table.name: MAF Hysteresis B ON (CL/OL)
table.description: MAF-based CL/OL hysteresis flag B set threshold. Stock: 4000.0 g/s.

table.name: MAF Hysteresis B OFF (CL/OL)
table.description: MAF-based CL/OL hysteresis flag B clear threshold. Stock: 3500.0 g/s.

table.name: MAF Hysteresis C ON (CL/OL)
table.description: MAF-based CL/OL hysteresis flag C set threshold. Stock: 2600.0 g/s.

table.name: MAF Hysteresis C OFF (CL/OL)
table.description: MAF-based CL/OL hysteresis flag C clear threshold. Stock: 1900.0 g/s.

table.name: MAF Hysteresis D ON (CL/OL)
table.description: MAF-based CL/OL hysteresis flag D set threshold. Stock: 2600.0 g/s.

table.name: Boost Control Enable Threshold
table.description: Sensor threshold above which boost control activates. Stock: 4.0.

table.name: Boost Control Disable Threshold
table.description: Sensor threshold below which boost control deactivates. Stock: 5.0.

table.name: Boost Feedback Filter Coefficient
table.description: IIR filter coefficient for boost feedback trim loop. Stock: 0.5.
